description_and_usage_notes: Stable unique identifier for this row. Assigned once and never changed, even if the row is updated or the file restructured. Format: [AGENCY]-[6-digit number]. Current prefix: CDC. When other HHS agencies are added they will use their own prefix (e.g., NIH-000001). Serves as the primary key in a relational database.
Federal fiscal year the budget covers (Oct 1 – Sep 30). FY2025 = Oct 2024 – Sep 2025.
Top-level department. Currently only 'HHS'. sub_agency carries the operating division.
HHS operating division. AHA, ATSDR, and OS appear only in FY2026 CJ and BIB rows. Leave blank only for HHS-wide aggregate rows.
Program name exactly as written in the source. Leave blank for aggregate rows. Document any naming variation in crosswalk_note.
First sub-program level. Required when granularity = sub_program_level. Leave blank for program_level and aggregate rows.
Second sub-program level. Rows with sp2 carry is_non_add = Subcomponent — NOT additive with parent. Filter WHERE sub_program_2 IS NULL for clean sub_program-level totals.
Third sub-program level. NOT additive with sp2 parent. Filter WHERE sub_program_3 IS NULL to exclude third-level detail.

allowed_values: Budget in Brief | Congressional Justification | House Approp Committee | Senate Approp Committee | Joint Explanatory Statement  | Continuing Resolution | Public Law | Operational Plan
description_and_usage_notes: Which document produced this figure. Join source_id to SOURCE REGISTRY for full document metadata including URL and release date.

Stage in the appropriations process. Request = President's Budget (BIB or CJ). Committee = House or Senate markup. Enacted = JES, Public Law, or Operational Plan. Continuing Resolution = CR placeholder aggregate.

Level of detail. aggregate = agency-wide total. program_level = one appropriations account. sp2/sp3 level rows carry is_non_add = Subcomponent and are non-additive with parent rows. Filter WHERE is_non_add = No for clean, non-overlapping totals.
Funding amount in millions of dollars. $0 = source explicitly shows no funding. BLANK = figure not reported at this level.

allowed_values: Discretionary | PPHF | PHS Evaluation | Mandatory | User Fees | Supplemental | Total
description_and_usage_notes: Discretionary = annual Budget Authority. PPHF = Prevention and Public Health Fund (eliminated in FY2026 PB; restored in JES). PHS Evaluation = Section 241 transfer funds. Mandatory programs also have a Total row for pivot visibility. Total = sum of all funding streams.

allowed_values: Active | Proposed Elimination | Proposed Transfer to AHA | Proposed Transfer to Office of Secretary | Proposed Transfer to Other Agency | Eliminated | Transferred to AHA | Restructured | Proposed Law
description_and_usage_notes: Status of program in this source. 'Proposed' = President's Budget only, not enacted.

No = independent line item; safe to sum with other No rows at the same level.
Non-add = labeled (non-add) in source; already counted in a parent row.
Subcomponent = sp2/sp3 structural breakdown; non-additive with parent.
Filter WHERE is_non_add = No for clean totals.
Qualitative context: program changes, funding shifts, aggregate discrepancy explanations. Keep factual and sourced.

allowed_values: S001–S027 (extends as new sources are added). Must match source_id in SOURCE REGISTRY.
description_and_usage_notes: Foreign key linking this row to the SOURCE REGISTRY. Join on source_id to retrieve document name, URL, release date, and granularity metadata. In a relational database this is a foreign key to the sources table. source_doc and source_url have been removed from this normalized version — all document metadata lives in the hhs-appropriations-source-registry.

allowed_values: Printed page number in source document
description_and_usage_notes: Page number as printed in the source document header (not the PDF viewer count). Required for verification. Use alongside source_id to locate the original figure.

allowed_values: CDC Center (abbrreviation)responsible for implemeting the program
description_and_usage_notes: Foreign key linking this row to the hhs-appropriations-source-registry. Join on source_id to retrieve document name, URL, release date, and granularity metadata. In a relational database this is a foreign key to the sources table. source_doc and source_url have been removed from this normalized version — all document metadata lives in the hhs-appropriations-source-registry.

allowed_values: CDC work unit responsible for implementing the program.

description_and_usage_notes: FTE data only (FY2026 CJ/JES subset). Confidence level of the work unit assignment in the RIF source data.
FTE data only. Percentage of FTEs in the matched work unit currently subject to RIF action (admin leave + separated). Present only when a RIF match exists.
FTE data only. Count of FTEs currently under RIF action (admin leave + separated).
FTE data only. Count of FTEs in the matched work unit not impacted by the RIF..
FTE data only. Count of FTEs reinstated afterfrom admin leave initial RIF action.  Still employed, working in regular duties.
FTE data only. Count of FTEs currently on paid administrative leave as part of the RIF process.  Still employed, not currently working
FTE data only. Count of FTEs separated (terminated) through the RIF.  No longer employed.
FTE data only. Count of FTEs with unclear RIF status in source data.
FTE data only. Total FTE count for the matched RIF work unit (not_impacted + admin_leave + reinstated + separated + unclear).
